data.title: Validate run-code async DOM mutations (waitForSelector + waitForLoadState)
data.description:
## Description
Create a test HTML fixture page with async DOM mutations and implement PoC scripts that exercise both page.waitForSelector and page.waitForLoadState via @playwright/cli run-code command.

Steps:
1. Create tests/fixtures/async-mutation-test.html with:
   - A setTimeout that appends a DOM element after 2 seconds
   - Content that triggers a navigation/load state change
2. Implement PoC: run npx @playwright/cli run-code with page.waitForSelector targeting the async element
3. Implement PoC: run npx @playwright/cli run-code with page.waitForLoadState
4. Both must complete within 60 seconds

This makes test_run_code_async_wait_for_selector and test_run_code_async_wait_for_load_state pass.

## File Impact
- tests/fixtures/async-mutation-test.html (CREATE)
- tests/scripts/test-playwright-cli-validation.sh (EDIT — update test implementations)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test HTML fixture exists
  Verify: test -f tests/fixtures/async-mutation-test.html
- [ ] waitForSelector PoC completes within 60s
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-playwright-cli-validation.sh 2>&1 | grep "test_run_code_async_wait_for_selector" | grep -q "PASS"
- [ ] waitForLoadState PoC completes within 60s
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-playwright-cli-validation.sh 2>&1 | grep "test_run_code_async_wait_for_load_state" | grep -q "PASS"
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
